title: Optimize Pipeline Performance
description: Measure baseline performance, implement partitioning strategy, enable V-Order optimization, optimize transformations, and create warehouse indexes. Target: >30% performance improvement.
acceptanceCriteria: Performance baseline documented with activity durations
Partitioning implemented on 3 fact tables (year/month strategy)
V-Order enabled on all gold tables
Warehouse indexes created on dimension and fact tables
dependencies: Baseline performance measurements (need to run pipeline)
Fabric capacity sufficient for V-Order optimization
SQL endpoint access for warehouse indexing
notes: Measure before optimizing - avoid premature optimization
V-Order is specific to Microsoft Fabric (not standard Delta Lake)
Balance optimization effort with actual performance gains
For portfolio, demonstrate systematic performance optimization approach
CLAUDE: Write partitioning code, V-Order config, broadcast hints, index DDL
ERIK: Run baseline measurements, deploy optimizations, validate performance gains
NOTE: This task is Erik-heavy due to baseline measurement and Fabric-specific testing
Broken down into 5 subtasks: 012_1 (baseline) → [012_2, 012_3, 012_4 in sequence/parallel] → 012_5 (validate)

optimizationTechniques.details: Broadcast small dimension tables in PySpark joins
Create indexes on dimension keys and foreign keys
